allow: PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 200 | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-3\) -and $_.Id -in @\(1000, 1001, 1002\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, LevelDisplayName, @{N='Msg';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(400,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List)
PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root --password="" -e "SELECT User, Host, plugin, authentication_string FROM mysql.user WHERE User='root';" 2>&1)

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root --password="" -e "SELECT User, Host, JSON_EXTRACT\(Priv, '$.plugin'\) AS plugin, JSON_EXTRACT\(Priv, '$.authentication_string'\) AS auth_string FROM mysql.global_priv WHERE User='root';" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem env: | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "\(?i\)\(password|DB_|JWT|spring|datasource\)" } | Select-Object Name, Value)
